title: Miniature Totems
description: A simple resourcepack that changes the model of the totem of undying and reduces it half in size to be less distracting in-game.
body: Were you ever annoyed or distracted by the big thicc totem you have that occupies most of your screen space well this pack aims to fix that by reducing the size of the totem in half without editing textures but the model of the totem so you can still have any custom textures or the vanilla one if you like.
